response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song "薔薇獄乙女" and artist "ALI PROJECT" from the top-left on-screen text. 2. Identified the performer as Cece3D via the #Cece3D hashtag. 3. Performed web search using ' "[Song Title]" [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics '. 4. Mapped the vocal performance to the first scene and the subsequent dialogue/interaction to the second scene based on audio content.
response.global_summary: A 3D VTuber performance of the song "Bara-goku Otome" followed by post-performance interaction and dialogue with a small companion character.

scenes.description: The character performs the song "Bara-goku Otome" on a 3D stage with clockwork gear aesthetics, while the title is displayed in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
豹のように美しくわたし
着飾るは闇の果て
嗚呼 絶えに絶え尽くしたモノから
その上に色を添える
嗚呼 散れどまた満ちる
踊れども 惑わず
嗚呼 変わりゆく
嗚呼 隠せど
解らない 解らない
それでも変わりゆく...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Beautiful as a leopard, I
Dress in the end of darkness
Ah, from the things that have completely ceased to exist
I add color on top of that
Ah, though they scatter, they fill again
Even if I dance, I do not lose my way
Ah, it will change
Ah, even if I hide it
I do not know, I do not know
Still, it will change...

scenes.description: Post-performance interaction and dialogue between the performer and a companion character.
